name: Tex Mex Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Scrub potatoes and cut lengthwise into wedges. Place on a baking sheet, cut side up.
3. Bake until lightly browned, about 40 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, combine beans, salsa, diced green chilis, onion, garlic, cilantro, chili powder, and cumin in a saucepan. Heat over very low heat for about 15 minutes.
5. Combine corn, tomato, scallions, and chopped cilantro. Set aside.
6. Place potato wedges on a large serving platter. Scoop bean mixture over the potatoes.
7. Finish by adding the tomato-corn mixture on top.
(Note: This recipe is straightforward and designed to be prepared quickly.)
